name: Dr. Srinivas Manohar
bio: Dr. Srinivas Manohar is a distinguished dental surgeon who specializes in replacing missing teeth structures (Prosthodontics) and surgical dental implant placements. With over 11 years of active clinical practice in Andhra Pradesh, he is recognized for his precision work in full mouth restorations, fixed dental bridges, cosmetic laminates, and advanced laser-assisted micro-surgeries.
meta_title: Dr. Srinivas Manohar, MDS - Implantologist Visakhapatnam
meta_description: Read qualifications, training, and achievements of Dr. Srinivas Manohar (MDS), lead prosthodontist & implantologist at Manohar Dental Clinic Visakhapatnam.

name: Dr. Sirisha
bio: Dr. Sirisha is a specialized child dentist (Pedodontist) dedicated to managing the oral health of infants, children, and teenagers. She specializes in child psychology and communication styles, turning what is often a stressful dentist experience into a positive, anxiety-free habit for young patients. She is an expert in cavity shielding, pediatric root canals (pulpectomy), and corrective childhood oral appliances.
meta_title: Dr. Sirisha, MDS - Pediatric Dentist Visakhapatnam
meta_description: Read qualifications, training, and child-care specialization of Dr. Sirisha (MDS), specialist pedodontist at Manohar Dental Clinic Visakhapatnam.

name: Dr. Usha Sri
bio: Dr. Usha Sri is a specialist Orthodontist dedicated to diagnosing and correcting misaligned teeth and jaw configurations. She is certified in clear aligner treatment designs, assisting patients in correcting teeth crowding, gaps, and severe overbites/underbites discreetly and comfortably. Her meticulous clinical style ensures precise alignments and beautiful, balanced smile results.
meta_title: Dr. Usha Sri, MDS - Orthodontist Visakhapatnam
meta_description: Read qualifications, training, and clear aligner certifications of Dr. Usha Sri (MDS), specialist orthodontist at Manohar Dental Clinic Visakhapatnam.
